{{Infobox location
| name = Oversight
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Oversight is an outpost located at the central nexus of existence within the [[Way]]. Situated at the north pole of [[Makiel]]'s home planet, this location serves as a strategic hub for monitoring the various [[Iterations]]. From this position, highly skilled [[Hounds]] can observe the threads of [[Fate]] across hundreds of different worlds, allowing them to track targets through time, predict upcoming disasters, and identify instances where the fates of different [[Iterations]] overlap to investigate potential violations.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Oversight]] is located at the nexus of everything in the heart of the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Oversight]] consists of a blue-and-green planet orbited by sixteen moons.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Twelve]] billion people live in [[Oversight]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A talented [[Hound]] can glimpse the destiny of every [[Iteration]] from [[Oversight]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hounds]] formed up around [[Oversight]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
